title: 2026 Grammy Predictions: Kendrick Lamar, Lady Gaga, Bad Bunny, and the List of Contenders
text:
2026 Grammy Predictions: Song of the Year

Predicted Winner:
"Luther" by Jack Antonoff, Roshwita Larisha Bacha, Matthew Bernard, Ink, Scott Bridgeway, Sam Dew, Kendrick Lamar, Mark Anthony Spears, Solána Rowe & Kamasi Washington

The article notes that Song of the Year nominees closely mirror Record of the Year contenders. The author explains that "'Luther' ultimately prevails" over other strong contenders, particularly highlighting how "A lot of observers are picking 'Golden,' but its absence from the ROY field is a bad sign."

Other Notable Contenders:
- "Abracadabra" - Lady Gaga & Andrew Watt
- "APT" - multiple songwriters including Bruno Mars and Christopher Brody Brown
- "DtMF" - Bad Bunny's track with seven credited writers
- "Manchild" - Sabrina Carpenter collaboration
- "Wildflower" - Billie Eilsch & Finneas O'Connell

The analysis suggests that whichever song wins Record of the Year will likely claim Song of the Year as well, given the overlapping nominations between both categories.
